title: AI Content Detector (Heuristic)
description: Local heuristic AI detection: paste text or upload an image to get a 0–100 AI-likelihood score, a three-tier verdict and a per-feature breakdown. No network, no API key.

disclaimer.title: Heuristic estimate — for reference only
disclaimer.body: This tool uses local statistical features (lexical diversity, sentence-length variance, n-gram repeats, AI-leaning lexicon, image metadata, edge/histogram statistics, etc.) to estimate AI likelihood. Accuracy is limited. Do NOT use it for copyright, academic integrity or formal adjudication.

text.heading: Paste or type text
text.placeholder: Paste Chinese or English text to check (≥ 80 characters recommended)…
text.empty: Paste or type text to start.
text.tooShort: Sample too short (< {{min}} chars) for a stable estimate.

image.cta: Click or drag an image here
image.dragHint: PNG / JPEG / WebP supported; up to ~10MB; processed locally
